commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: "And daily "it is said, "in the temple, and from house to house, they ceased not to teach and preach Christ Jesus"

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: And in those days— when these things were done, when there were scourgings, when there were threatenings, when the disciples were multiplying— also, it says, there arose a murmuring.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: And in those days— when these things were done, when there were scourgings, when there were threatenings, when the disciples were multiplying.
